```{r}
#| label: tbl-surgery-rates
#| tbl-cap: "Surgical procedures by category"
#| tbl-cap-location: top

tmp <- reference_data |>
  neoipcr::get_surgery_rate_table() |>
  neoipcr::pretty_names()

col_names <- attr(tmp, "names.pretty")
row_names <- attr(tmp, "row.names.pretty")
pro_cat <- col_names[["pro_cat"]]

out <- tmp |>
  gt(rowname_col = pro_cat) |>
  sub_missing() |>
  fmt_number(decimals = 1) |>
  fmt_number(columns = col_names[["n"]], decimals = 0) |>
  cols_width(matches(pro_cat) ~ pct(50)) |>
  cols_width(starts_with("Q") ~ pct(7)) |>
  tab_options(footnotes.font.size = pct(60)) |>
  tab_spanner(
    label = "Procedure rate",
    columns = c(
      col_names[["pooled"]],
      col_names[["q1"]],
      col_names[["q2"]],
      col_names[["q3"]]),
    id = "procedure_rate"
  ) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = md(
      paste0(
        "$$\\text{",
        "Procedure rate",
        "} = \\frac{\\text{",
        "Number of procedures",
        "}}{\\text{",
        "Number of Patients",
        "}} \\times ",
        format(100, big.mark = locale_sep_mark),
        "$$"
      )),
    locations = cells_column_spanners(spanners = "procedure_rate")
  ) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = "N: The aggregated number surgical procedures performed in all infants.",
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = col_names[["n"]])) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = "Pooled: The procedure rate calculated across all infants from all departments.",
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = col_names[["pooled"]])) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = paste(paste(col_names[["q1"]],col_names[["q2"]],col_names[["q3"]], sep = ", "), ": The quartiles (25%, 50% and 75% quantiles) of the procedure rates of the partner departments."),
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = c(col_names[["q1"]],col_names[["q2"]],col_names[["q3"]])))

out
```
